content.rendered: Dive into the essentials of personal branding with host David Reske and marketing expert Larissa Bedgood on “Marketing In The Now.” This episode explores how executives can leverage personal branding to enhance their professional influence and organizational impact. Larissa offers practical advice on creating an authentic and engaging online presence, from understanding your core “why” to maintaining consistent and strategic engagements. Discover how blending professional insights with personal stories can build a relatable persona, and learn key strategies for navigating the challenges of personal branding in today’s digital landscape. Tune in for valuable insights on using personal branding to open doors to new opportunities and achieve greater success.
